headline: Semi rout deepens, broad tape down (SPY -1.4%, QQQ -3.3%); desk takes lone CWAN long half-size

market_state.line: SPY -1.43% / QQQ -3.32% but regime stays risk_on; VXX stress ratio benign at 0.98. Semis lead damage — thin conviction for new longs.

actions.line: Bullish signal, tight $0.19 risk to stop; kept half-size on neutral research backdrop.

watch.line: -21.5% on 4.7× volume, MACD bearish — biggest mover of scan, needs catalyst ID before fade attempt.
-13.2% extends semi rout flagged last scan; watch for AH stabilisation or continued bleed.
-13.7% alongside MU — semi contagion still unresolved.
-15.7% big move, 1.5× vol; semi-adjacent semi-conductor materials name to track.
+12.4% sole green outlier on 1.7× vol — only upside mover in a broadly red tape.

changed: Desk drops defensive JNJ/CNP/PNC rotation from last scan; sole active take is CWAN long half-size.
Semi rout continues (MU, SNDK) but leadership shifts to PRIM -21.5% as worst AH mover.
caveats: AH_POST window — prices as of 18:17 ET; AH liquidity is thin and levels may gap materially at tomorrow's open.
Regime reads risk_on despite SPY/QQQ red day — VXX ratio 0.98 not yet confirming stress; treat regime label cautiously until RTH confirmation.
